title: September 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 11''' is the 254th day of the year (255th in leap years). There are 111 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Ian Abercrombie]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Brian De Palma]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Tony Gilroy]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Jacen Burrows]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 133|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 133]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Heir to the Empire (TPB)|''Heir to the Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 12|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 12]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 56|''Star Wars Insider'' 56]] released for subscribers.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 37]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Droids Over Iego]]'' released.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 9|''Star Wars'' (2013) 9]] released.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader: Dark Lord of the Sith Vol. 3 — The Burning Seas]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars: Thrawn (TPB)|''Star Wars: Thrawn'' trade paperback]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Tales from Vandor]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Resistance - Supreme Leader Snoke 1|''Age of Resistance - Supreme Leader Snoke'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 25|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 25]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Martha Veitch]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[Inquisitors 3|''Inquisitors'' 3]] published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars (2020) 50|''Star Wars'' (2020) 50]] published.
